clips.title: The Leash Has UX
clips.hook: The leash is always marketed as convenience.

clips.title: The Suggestion Box Trap
clips.hook: Exit is a strategy. Voice is a suggestion box.

clips.title: The State Has A Billing Department
clips.hook: The state is a fiction with a billing department.

clips.title: Privacy Is A Boundary
clips.hook: Privacy is not suspicious. It is a boundary.

clips.title: Your Team-Colored Cage
clips.hook: A cage painted in your team colors is still a cage.

clips.title: The Algorithmic Landlord
clips.hook: The algorithm is not your community. It is your landlord with analytics.
